title: Data Source, Dataset and Inference Doctrine

registry_entities.purpose: Store source metadata, publisher, date, URL/reference, licence and access date.
Store extracted and cleaned values with version, schema and hash.
Preserve changes across time and avoid silent data replacement.
Store calculated percentages, ratios, rankings, averages, trends, gaps and comparisons.
Record what inference was drawn from data and why it is justified.
Map datasets and fields to chart/table/infographic templates.
Record which article uses which dataset, metric or inference.
Track when a dataset, metric or rendered object is reused in another article.

data_credit_logic.credit_pattern: Data source: [source name]. Data visualization: Drishvara.
data_credit_logic.ownership_note: Source data remains attributed to the source; visualization and interpretation are Drishvara-controlled.
Derived metric/inference is Drishvara analysis, subject to source data rights.
Treat as Drishvara-owned/controlled if created through Drishvara workflow.

data_credit_logic.credit_pattern: Sources: [source list]. Analysis and visualization: Drishvara.
data_credit_logic.ownership_note: All sources must be separately recorded and verified.

freshness_rules.condition: Dataset is recent and source context remains valid.
Dataset is older but still valid for historical or analytical context.
Dataset may no longer represent the present situation.
freshness_rules.required_action: Refresh source or mark as archival.

storage_rules_before_backend_activation: Store source metadata, dataset schema, derived metrics and inference records as governed JSON/CSV artifacts.
Do not store full copyrighted reports unless licence permits.
Store source links, extracted permitted facts, cleaned values, data hash and reuse status.
Keep article prose, source data, derived metrics, inference and visualization records separate.
